ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "cds_code" TEXT /* CDS (California Department of Education) code for the school */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "charter" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the school is a charter school */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the school's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the school's location */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the school is located */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the school is located */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the school was founded */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal */,
  "principal_contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the principal */,
  "enrollment_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students the school can accommodate */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the school's website */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the school */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the county */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the county */,
  "average_household_size" REAL /* Average household size in the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the district is located */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the district was founded */,
  "superintendent_name" TEXT /* Name of the superintendent */,
  "superintendent_contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the superintendent */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the district's website */,
  "enrollment_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students the district can accommodate */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the district office */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the district office */,
  "number_of_schools" INTEGER /* Number of schools in the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the performance data */,
  "enroll12" INTEGER /* Number of 12th-grade students enrolled */,
  "num_tst_takr" INTEGER /* Number of test takers */,
  "avg_scr_eng" REAL /* Average score in English */,
  "avg_scr_read" REAL /* Average score in Reading */,
  "avg_scr_math" REAL /* Average score in Math */,
  "avg_scr_sci" REAL /* Average score in Science */,
  "num_ge21" INTEGER /* Number of students who scored at or above the 21st percentile */,
  "pct_ge21" REAL /* Percentage of students who scored at or above the 21st percentile */,
  "pct_frpm" REAL /* Percentage of students receiving free or reduced-price meals */,
  "graduation_rate" REAL /* Percentage of students who graduate */,
  "dropout_rate" REAL /* Percentage of students who drop out */,
  "student_teacher_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of students to teachers */,
  "average_class_size" REAL /* Average size of classes */,
  "number_of_teachers" INTEGER /* Number of teachers in the school */,
  "average_teacher_experience" REAL /* Average years of experience of teachers */,
  "number_of_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled */,
  "average_daily_attendance" REAL /* Average daily attendance rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_performance_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, public) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES school_performance ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the research project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "lead_researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher for the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed, suspended) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_lead_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sponsor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the sponsor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the sponsor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the sponsor */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the sponsor's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_sponsorships" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsor */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sponsorship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sponsorship */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Amount of funding provided by the sponsor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project that produced the publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal where the publication was published */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the journal */,
  "issue" INTEGER /* Issue of the journal */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Page numbers of the publication */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the publication (e.g., published, in press) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_publications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications_authors" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the author in the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the author */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier of the author */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or title of the author (e.g., Professor, Researcher) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications_citations" (
  "citing_publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication that cites another publication */,
  "cited_publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being cited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citing_publication_id", "cited_publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications_keywords" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword associated with the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id", "keyword")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications_metrics" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "citations" INTEGER /* Number of citations the publication has received */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* Number of times the publication has been downloaded */,
  "altmetric_score" REAL /* Altmetric score of the publication */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal where the publication was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id")
)
